ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  " Contract_Expiry_Date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "coach_id" TEXT /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience for the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the performance record */,
  "stint" INTEGER /* Stint number (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the performance record */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stints" (
  "stint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stint */,
  "stint_name" TEXT /* Name of the stint */,
  "stint_type" TEXT /* Type of stint (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "minute_scored" INTEGER /* Minute when the goal was scored */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., penalty, field) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES performance_stats ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the game */,
  "stint" INTEGER /* Stint number (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "minute_received" INTEGER /* Minute when the penalty was received */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., yellow, red) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES performance_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
